channel.title: BRUTAL.
channel.description: A creative studio that breaks conventions. We design brands, build digital products, and create unforgettable experiences.

item.title: Minimal Max: Less Interface, More Clarity
item.description: A fintech app redesigned with ruthless minimalism by BRUTAL. studio. App ratings jumped from 3.2 to 4.7 stars and paid conversions increased 67 percent.

item.title: Neon Nights: Branding a Nightlife Empire
item.description: Complete brand identity for a nightlife empire across four cities. Neon typography, bold color systems, and 340 percent social engagement growth.

item.title: Tech Forward: Redesigning Enterprise SaaS
item.description: A product-led SaaS platform redesigned from the ground up by BRUTAL. studio. Task completion times dropped 58 percent and churn fell 23 percent.

item.title: Urban Flow: Motion Identity for the Street
item.description: Motion identity for a streetwear brand rooted in skate culture. Five motion principles, 80 animation components, and 215 percent video engagement growth.
